# chapter13plan.org

> Guide to Chapter 13 repayment plans -- how they work, what you pay, and plan modifications.

chapter13plan.org is a free, open-source educational resource about Chapter 13 bankruptcy repayment plans. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://chapter13plan.org/: Guide to Chapter 13 plans -- payment calculations, plan length, feasibility

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
